[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11010100 4
1 01110000 3
2 11100110 5
3 01100111 5
4 11111001 6
5 10001111 5
6 10111100 5
7 10001011 4

01 10 00001110 3
12 21 10000001 2
23 32 11101101 6
34 43 00001111 4
45 54 00010011 3
56 65 01110111 6
67 76 00101100 3
70 07 00100101 3

02 20 10001111 5 match 5
13 31 01101100 4
24 42 11100010 4
35 53 00011100 3
46 64 01100100 3
57 75 01011011 5
60 06 00001001 2
71 17 00101011 4

03 30 01100010 3
14 41 01100011 4
25 52 11110001 5
36 63 01101011 5
47 74 01001000 2
50 05 01111110 6
61 16 00000111 3
72 27 10101010 4

04 40 01101101 5
15 51 01110000 3 match 1
26 62 10000110 3
37 73 01000111 4
